hero.subtitle: ChatDesk helps African businesses manage customer conversations, automate replies with AI, track sales pipelines, and run broadcast campaigns — all from a single dashboard.

aiReply.description: Automate repetitive questions with smart AI agents that respond instantly.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business

items.question: How do I connect my WhatsApp number?
items.answer: Simply scan a QR code from your dashboard and your WhatsApp account will be linked in seconds.

items.question: Can multiple team members use the same WhatsApp number?
items.answer: Yes! Your team can collaborate on the same number, assign conversations, and leave internal notes.

items.question: How does the AI auto-reply work?
items.answer: You set trigger keywords and response templates. When a customer messages with a matching keyword, the AI responds automatically.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption and your data is stored securely with Supabase.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
items.answer: Yes, contact our support team and we'll adjust your plan immediately.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site traffic. You can manage your preferences or learn more in our

footer.description: WhatsApp CRM platform for African businesses.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: ChatDesk ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our WhatsApp CRM platform at chatdesk.org and related services.

dataCollected.title: Information We Collect
dataCollected.body: We collect information you provide directly: your name, email address, organization details, and WhatsApp messages you manage through our platform. We also automatically collect usage data such as IP addresses, browser type, pages visited, and cookies to improve our services.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.body: We use your information to provide and maintain our services, process transactions, send service-related communications, improve our platform, provide customer support, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences. We also use analytics cookies (such as Google Analytics) to understand how visitors use our site. You can manage your cookie preferences through our cookie consent banner or your browser settings.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your data. We may share information with service providers who assist us in operating our platform (e.g., hosting, email delivery, analytics), and when required by law or to protect our rights. All third-party providers are contractually bound to protect your data.

security.title: Data Security
security.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS/SSL), secure database hosting with Supabase, and access controls. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can export your data from the dashboard or request deletion by contacting us. If you are in the EU/EEA, you also have rights under GDPR including the right to data portability and the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at chatdesk@proton.me.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using ChatDesk ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.

services.title: Description of Service
services.body: ChatDesk provides a WhatsApp CRM platform that allows businesses to manage customer conversations, automate replies with AI, track sales pipelines, run broadcast campaigns, and collaborate as a team. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features at any time with reasonable notice.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.body: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

acceptable.title: Acceptable Use
acceptable.body: You agree not to use ChatDesk for any unlawful purpose, to send spam or unsolicited messages, to violate WhatsApp's Terms of Service, to infringe on intellectual property rights, or to attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

payment.title: Payment & Billing
payment.body: Paid plans are billed on a monthly or annual basis. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law. We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice. Failure to pay may result in service suspension.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.body: ChatDesk and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by ChatDesk and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of your data and content.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these terms. You may cancel your account at any time from your dashboard settings. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately, though we may retain certain data as required by law.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ChatDesk shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, or business opportunities. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.body: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or a prominent notice on our platform. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at chatdesk@proton.me.
